old_value: {"id":"broadside-i5iz","title":"Add Mastodon actor metadata to persona actor document","description":"The actor document served at /users/{username} is missing several fields Mastodon expects: published (account creation date, shows 'Joined' on profile), icon (avatar), image (header/banner), attachment (profile metadata key-value pairs like Website/GitHub), discoverable (directory/search visibility), endpoints.sharedInbox (delivery optimization), manuallyApprovesFollowers (should be false). Add all of these to the actor JSON-LD output. Avatar/header paths are already stored in personas table but not serialized. Creation date is in created_at column.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"mark@reviewcommit.com","created_at":"2026-07-18T02:49:11.114267331Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-18T02:49:11.114267331Z","labels":["federation"]}

new_value: Actor document now includes: published (join date), discoverable, manuallyApprovesFollowers, endpoints.sharedInbox, icon (avatar), image (header), attachment (PropertyValue metadata fields). CLI: persona update --field 'Name=Value' sets metadata.
